\begin{table}[!tb]
\centering
\caption{Seed robustness of the \texttt{FULL} pipeline (standard head and standard fine-tuning). Each column reports the grouped five-fold mean validation accuracy (\%) for one random seed; the last column is the across-seed mean\,$\pm$\,standard deviation. Seed~42 is the configuration used in the main experiments. The across-seed standard deviation is approximately 0.02~pp, confirming that the reported results are not seed-dependent. These re-runs were performed in a fresh environment and reproduce the main-text accuracies to within $0.2$~pp; the seed variance itself is the quantity of interest here.}
\label{tab:multiseed_stability}
